paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a 20-session window. The price is as of July 17, 2026. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes a headline from simplywall.st regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns and a $375 million convertibles deal. This news item was published on July 17, 2026. The company has also disclosed the completion of a $431.25 million offering of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, with total net proceeds of approximately $416.81 million.

There have been various SEC filings, including a Form 8-K on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of convertible senior notes, and another Form 8-K on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed, and three new social posts in the last 24 hours, with users discussing the stock's future direction.
